# Custom nodes for workflow: liveportrait (non-core; core set ships with the installer)
# Format: folder git_url
# Hand-maintained (NOT auto-generated — do not run generate_model_manifests.py over
# liveportrait/wan22-vace, it would clobber the hand-written model URLs + mirror lines).
# The installer/download_models.bat prefer vendor/custom_nodes/<folder> before this git url.
ComfyUI-AdvancedLivePortrait https://github.com/PowerHouseMan/ComfyUI-AdvancedLivePortrait.git
comfyui-reactor-node https://codeberg.org/Gourieff/comfyui-reactor-node.git
